mapper.select: SELECT id, knowledge_id, document_id, vector_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, source_page, source_section, extra_metadata, created_at FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} ORDER BY document_id ASC, chunk_index ASC

SELECT id, knowledge_id, document_id, vector_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, source_page, source_section, extra_metadata, created_at FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_knowledge_chunk (knowledge_id, document_id, vector_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, source_page, source_section, extra_metadata, created_at) VALUES (#{knowledgeId}, #{documentId}, #{vectorId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{tokenCount}, #{sourcePage}, #{sourceSection}, #{extraMetadata}, NOW())

INSERT INTO ai_knowledge_chunk (knowledge_id, document_id, vector_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, source_page, source_section, extra_metadata, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.knowledgeId}, #{item.documentId}, #{item.vectorId}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.content}, #{item.tokenCount}, #{item.sourcePage}, #{item.sourceSection}, #{item.extraMetadata}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}

SELECT id, knowledge_id, document_id, vector_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, source_page, source_section, extra_metadata, created_at FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') ORDER BY chunk_index ASC LIMIT 10
